title: Commission.subagents entry missing from Commission.allowed_tools is a configuration conflict — error_occurred + agent_stopped reason='error'
description: Cross-field coherence. If a Commission.subagents entry's name is not also in Commission.allowed_tools, the supervisor has declared a subagent while simultaneously forbidding its exposure. The runner MUST detect this at startup, emit error_occurred, and stop with reason='error' before any model turn runs.

subagents.name: researcher
subagents.description: Subagent that the agent might call.

forbidden_events.label: no model turn may run when startup validation fails
no tool may be invoked when startup validation fails
